ProjectionState.title: Projection State
ProjectionState.description: The current state of the Bible projection, synchronized across all instances.

bookId.description: The ID of the current book.

verseIndex.description: The index of the currently projected verse.

updatedAt.description: When the state was last updated.

updatedBy.description: The UID of the user who last updated the state.

/projection/current.description: The single document holding the current projection state.
